features: Color: Navy Blue; Material: Paper; Size: 14cm x 10cm / 5.5 x 3.9 inch(L*W); Packing List: 20 Pcs x Pillow Box.
Advantage: Our pillow boxes with a rustic surface, the paper pillow boxes for jewelry work great on many occasions, great for weddings, birthdays, holidays, parties, Halloween, and Christmas.

Instruction: Our pillow gift boxes are easy to fold, just open and fold up the sides, then the pillow boxes are completed. Packed flat to you for more convenient storage, saving space when it is not required.

Application: Our pillow boxes are made of paper, a good option for gift decoration, its elegant design container for gifts, candy, and chocolate, and also for small items like necklaces, bracelets, rings, and earrings.
